arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EFS file system.

availability_zone_id.description: The ID of the availability zone where the EFS file system is located.

availability_zone_name.description: The name of the availability zone where the EFS file system is located.

creation_token.description: A unique token used to ensure idempotent creation of the EFS file system.

dns_name.description: The DNS name of the EFS file system.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the EFS file system is encrypted.

file_system_id.description: The ID of the EFS file system.

id.description: The ID of the EFS file system (same as file_system_id).

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the file system.

lifecycle_policy.description: The lifecycle policies for the EFS file system, defining transitions to different storage classes.

name.description: The name of the EFS file system.

performance_mode.description: The performance mode of the EFS file system (e.g., generalPurpose or maxIO).

protection.description: The protection settings for the EFS file system, including replication options.

provisioned_throughput_in_mibps.description: The provisioned throughput in MiB/s for the EFS file system.

size_in_bytes.description: The size of the EFS file system in bytes.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the EFS file system.

throughput_mode.description: The throughput mode for the EFS file system (e.g., bursting or provisioned).
